standard_definition: Project-defined unique row identifier for one index ICU stay
source_reference: Current study protocol
code_rule: concatenate dataset and stay id

standard_definition: Source database label
source_reference: Current study protocol
code_rule: constant per dataset

standard_definition: Patient or stay identifier retained from source database
source_reference: MIMIC-IV PhysioNet v3.1 and eICU official table docs
code_rule: retain official source id

standard_definition: Hospitalization identifier for retained index stay
source_reference: MIMIC-IV admissions and eICU patient table docs
code_rule: retain official hospitalization id

standard_definition: Index ICU admission anchor for retained stay
source_reference: MIMIC-IV icustays and eICU patient table docs
code_rule: use official ICU admission anchor from each database

standard_definition: Death before discharge from index hospitalization
source_reference: MIMIC live schema audit and eICU patient table docs
code_rule: eICU Expired=1; MIMIC hospital_expire_flag as primary audited against deathtime

standard_definition: Strict AHA CKM stage 0-4
source_reference: AHA CKM advisory PMID 37807924
code_rule: apply AHA logic as far as source variables permit

standard_definition: Adapted antecedent CKM burden stage A0-A3 excluding current index AMI from automatic stage escalation
source_reference: Current study protocol based on AHA framework
code_rule: A0 no burden; A1 adiposity only; A2 metabolic risk or disease without CKD or antecedent CVD; A3 CKD or antecedent HF AF stroke PAD

standard_definition: Component evidence flags for adiposity metabolic kidney and antecedent CVD domains
source_reference: Current study protocol
code_rule: store pipe-separated component flags used to derive adapted stage

standard_definition: Exposure evidence quality level
source_reference: Current study protocol
code_rule: classify as shared_core_only or shared_plus_proxy

standard_definition: Age at index ICU admission
source_reference: MIMIC-IV patients and eICU patient table docs
code_rule: adult if >=18

standard_definition: Administrative sex recorded in source database
source_reference: MIMIC-IV patients and eICU patient table docs
code_rule: standardize source sex field

standard_definition: Body mass index or closest source-supported adiposity proxy
source_reference: AHA CKM advisory plus official database docs
code_rule: prefer official BMI in MIMIC OMR and derive BMI from admission weight and height in eICU

standard_definition: History or evidence of hypertension
source_reference: AHA CKM advisory
code_rule: ICD or text evidence preferred; SBP only supportive

standard_definition: History of diabetes mellitus or equivalent metabolic disease
source_reference: AHA CKM advisory
code_rule: ICD or text evidence of diabetes mellitus

standard_definition: History of dyslipidemia or hyperlipidemia
source_reference: AHA CKM advisory
code_rule: ICD or text evidence of dyslipidemia

standard_definition: History of CKD renal failure ESRD or dialysis-related chronic renal disease
source_reference: AHA CKM advisory
code_rule: ICD or text evidence of chronic renal disease

standard_definition: Earliest clinically relevant creatinine around ICU admission
source_reference: MIMIC derived tables and eICU lab table docs
code_rule: use first clinically relevant creatinine in predefined window

standard_definition: Estimated glomerular filtration rate or closest kidney function proxy
source_reference: AHA CKM advisory and CKD-EPI concept
eicu_table_field: derived from local fields if available
code_rule: use official OMR eGFR when present; otherwise leave missing

standard_definition: Earliest clinically relevant glucose around ICU admission
source_reference: MIMIC derived tables and eICU lab table docs
code_rule: use first clinically relevant glucose in window

standard_definition: Systolic blood pressure closest to ICU admission
source_reference: MIMIC derived vitals and eICU vital tables
code_rule: use clinically plausible systolic blood pressure nearest to ICU admission

standard_definition: STEMI status if stably identifiable across databases
source_reference: AMI coding conventions plus database text fields
mimic_table_field: ICD-9 or ICD-10 subtype rules plus diagnosis text
code_rule: derive conservatively and treat as sensitivity variable

standard_definition: Antecedent heart failure history before or at admission excluding current AMI as sole trigger
source_reference: AHA CKM stage 4 clinical CVD concepts
code_rule: ICD or text evidence of prior or coexisting HF

standard_definition: Antecedent atrial fibrillation history
source_reference: AHA CKM stage 4 clinical CVD concepts
code_rule: ICD or text evidence of AF

standard_definition: Antecedent stroke or peripheral artery disease history
source_reference: AHA CKM stage 4 clinical CVD concepts
code_rule: ICD or text evidence of stroke or PAD

standard_definition: Length of ICU stay for retained index ICU stay
source_reference: MIMIC-IV icustays and eICU patient table docs
code_rule: retain official ICU LOS or derive from official offset

standard_definition: Length of hospital stay for index hospitalization
source_reference: MIMIC-IV admissions and eICU patient table docs
code_rule: derive from official admission and discharge anchors

standard_definition: Mechanical ventilation during early ICU course or hospitalization
source_reference: MIMIC derived ventilation concept and eICU ventilation events
code_rule: MIMIC InvasiveVent or Tracheostomy; eICU mechvent start

standard_definition: Vasopressor use during early ICU course or hospitalization
source_reference: MIMIC derived vasoactive table and eICU infusiondrug
code_rule: binary flag of vasoactive exposure based on official or operational drug fields

standard_definition: Death before ICU discharge
source_reference: MIMIC ICU timing and eICU unit discharge status
code_rule: death before ICU discharge
